stemHtml: Which of the following statements describes the "datum" in mass and balance calculations?

options.a: It is the most aft position of the centre of gravity.
options.b: Initially, it is the most forward position of the centre of gravity and moves aft during the flight.
options.c: It is the point on the aircraft designated by the manufacturers from which all centre of gravity measurements and calculations are made.
options.d: It is the distance from the centre of gravity to the point through which the weight of the component acts.
